import{useEffect,useMemo,useState}from"react";import{getCustomers}from"../services/api";import"../styles/Dashboard.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Dashboard(){const[customers,setCustomers]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{// Loads customer list once to build summary cards.
const loadCustomers=async()=>{try{const response=await getCustomers();setCustomers(response.data||[]);}catch(error){setCustomers([]);}finally{setLoading(false);}};loadCustomers();},[]);const totalCustomers=useMemo(()=>customers.length,[customers]);const totalUdhaar=useMemo(()=>customers.reduce((sum,customer)=>sum+Math.max(customer.totalBalance||0,0),0),[customers]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{className:"dashboard-page py-4",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"dashboard-header mb-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"dashboard-title",children:"Shop Overview"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"dashboard-subtitle",children:"Track your outstanding udhaar and customer base at a glance."})]}),loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"dashboard-loading card p-4",children:"Loading dashboard data..."}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"row g-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"col-md-6",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{className:"summary-card udhaar-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"summary-label",children:"Total Udhaar"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{className:"summary-value",children:["Rs ",totalUdhaar.toLocaleString("en-IN")]})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"col-md-6",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{className:"summary-card customer-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"summary-label",children:"Total Customers"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"summary-value",children:totalCustomers})]})})]})]})});}export default Dashboard;
